items.content: Discussed potential water source contamination risks in Ziguinchor region with the AI, focusing on agricultural runoff impacts. Needed to draft a preliminary report section.
Asked the AI for a summary of recent climate justice advocacy trends in West Africa for a conference presentation preparation. Found a few key points about community-led adaptation strategies.
Searched for local Senegalese vegetable recipes that can be adapted for a small balcony garden. Settled on a method for growing 'njau-njau' (amaranth).
Reviewed project timelines with the AI to identify potential overlaps with the initial phase of parental leave. Needed to reallocate some fieldwork responsibilities.
Asked the AI to find information on upcoming Afrobeats festivals or concerts in Dakar for the next few months. Hoping to catch a live show.
Generated a list of potential talking points for a discussion on gender-responsive WASH interventions at a regional workshop. Focused on empowering women in water management.
Queried the AI about the rules and history of Senegalese wrestling (laamb) to better understand the sport as a spectator. Learned about different fighting styles.
Requested assistance in drafting an email to a donor organization regarding a budget revision for the Casamance project. Needed to ensure clarity and professionalism.
Asked the AI for research papers on innovative sanitation technologies suitable for rural African contexts. Found a promising article on decentralized wastewater treatment.
Explored potential nursery sites for seedlings for the NGO's community gardening initiative with AI's help, considering water access and soil quality.
